headline: American Electric Power Targets AI Data Center Growth With Expanded Capex
summary: American Electric Power (NasdaqGS:AEP) is expanding its capital expenditure plans through 2030 to address rising power needs from AI driven data center growth. The company is positioning its generation and grid investments to support large scale tech and cloud infrastructure customers that require reliable, high density electricity. This capex shift reflects the growing link between regulated utilities and digital infrastructure as AI workloads increase long term electricity demand...
